function buildRBCLiftTable(rbc,rbcNet,out){ if(!out)return '

Run the model.

'; var origC=out.rbc_orig_computed||{}; var predR=out.rbc_predeal_result||{}; var netR=out.rbc_net_result||{}; var origVals=origC.original_values||{}; var predAdj=predR.predeal_adjustments||{}; var netAdj=netR.net_adjustments||{}; // Years: 2026-2035 (skip base year 2025) var years=(origC.years||[]).map(Number).filter(function(y){return y>=2026&&y<=2035;}).sort(function(a,b){return a-b;}); if(!years.length){ // fallback: pull from any source var src=origVals[Object.keys(origVals)[0]]?Object.keys(origVals):[]; years=src.map(Number).filter(function(y){return y>=2026&&y<=2035;}).sort(function(a,b){return a-b;}); } if(!years.length)return '

No RBC data available.

'; function lookup(d,yr){return d[yr]||d[String(yr)]||{};} function fx(x){if(x==null||isNaN(x))return '-';return Number(x).toFixed(2)+'x';} function fxLift(x){if(x==null||isNaN(x))return '-';var s=x>=0?'+':'';return s+Number(x).toFixed(2)+'x';} function origRatio(yr){return lookup(origVals,yr).ratio_w_margin;} function predRatio(yr){return lookup(predAdj,yr).ratio_w_margin;} function netRatio(yr){return lookup(netAdj,yr).ratio_w_margin;} var h='
RBC Ratio Post-Covariance (w/ Margin) — Lift Analysis
'; h+='
'; h+=''+ years.map(function(y){return '';}).join('')+''; // Original row h+=''+ years.map(function(y){return '';}).join('')+''; // Predeal row h+=''+ years.map(function(y){return '';}).join('')+''; // Net row h+=''+ years.map(function(y){return '';}).join('')+''; // Lift row (Net - Original) h+=''+ years.map(function(y){ var o=origRatio(y),n=netRatio(y); var lift=(o!=null&&n!=null)?n-o:null; var col=lift==null?'':lift>0?'#28a745':lift<0?'#C0392B':''; return ''; }).join('')+''; h+='
Scenario'+y+'
Original'+fx(origRatio(y))+'
Predeal'+fx(predRatio(y))+'
Net (Post-Deal)'+fx(netRatio(y))+'
Lift (Net − Original)'+fxLift(lift)+'
'; return h; } Blockbuster Deals: Reinsurance
